author: Gary McIntosh
content:
We recently had a full electrical installation done on our new build home, and I can’t recommend our electrician highly enough. From start to finish, he was absolutely brilliant.

Not only did he carry out all the work to a high standard, but he also offered genuinely helpful advice throughout the process. He suggested smart ways to save energy, such as LED lighting options, more efficient layouts, and even advice on future-proofing the wiring for things like solar panels and EV charging. His knowledge really helped us make decisions that will benefit us in the long run.

He also gave great input on the positioning of light fixtures, sockets, and switches—making sure everything was both practical and looked good. His ideas made a big difference, especially in spaces like the kitchen and living room where layout is key.

Professional, friendly, and full of great ideas—he made the whole process smooth and stress-free. We’re really happy with the results!
